title: Pipeline Assembly Component
description: Designed pipeline and hose assembly components to GD&T-compliant accuracy with parametric modeling.
objectives: Route hydraulic lines through tight engine bay
solution: Designed complex 3D pipe routing using SolidWorks. Created custom parametric brackets that adapt to different engine configurations. Ran interference detection across all suspension travel states.
lessonsLearned: Flexible hoses are better for high-vibration zones
Parametric brackets save hours on design revisions
